articles.title: Hari Raya message: Faishal Ibrahim calls on Muslims to strengthen ties across society
articles.content: Muslims in Singapore should go beyond the community to strengthen ties across the nation's diverse society, said Acting Minister-in-charge of Muslim Affairs Assoc Prof Faishal Ibrahim. It was broadcast on television channel Suria. It was designated a national monument in 1974
